element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic; player builds first robot before combat
Learned through initial map encounters; single robot vs enemies
Costs a turn; introduces tactical depth after initial battles
Essential for progression; unlocked through level-gated Inventor's Friends series
Progressive introduction tied to inventory; Scrap 9-10 are endgame
Player manually allocates robot attributes instead of auto-leveling
Advanced customization; rewards planning and experimentation
Battles with time limits; bonus capsules offer risk/reward
Most enemies drop items; recycling generates money
Player can have up to 3 robots; requires tactical loadout decisions
Motivation revealed through plot progression; leads to endgame confrontation
Escalates stakes; final objective involves space fortress

typical_relief_triggers: Safe town/NPC areas for invention & customization
Level-based progression unlocking new invention recipes
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy contact triggering first-strike advantage loss
ATB gauge filling for enemy turns
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternates between customization/planning phases (relief) and map exploration/combat encounters (tension); tension escalates through story beats and endgame space fortress

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Inventor's Friends discoveries gated by player level; higher-level scraps and equipment combinations available as progression advances

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to robot building and basic ATB combat; enemies encountered through map contact are designed to teach mechanics gradually
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Expansion to multiple robot team management; introduction of time-limited bonus challenges; tactical switching becomes necessary
difficulty_curve.late_game: Confrontation with The Hackers and Gateau; endgame involves space fortress; endgame scraps (9-10, A-B) enable most powerful weapons
notable_spikes: First boss encounter requiring multi-robot strategy
Final space fortress confrontation with Gateau

notable_level_patterns.description: Safe areas (e.g., Rococo) serve as bases for invention, customization, and NPC interaction; gated access to higher-level recipes based on character level
Open exploration triggering battles by enemy contact; player movement and positioning can affect battle initiation (front, side, behind advantage)

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: ATB battle arena with item pickup
notable_level_patterns.description: Timed combat encounters with bonus capsules scattered during time-limit challenges; rewards for fast melee-focused play
Story beats unlock new regions and escalate stakes; Tetron artifact hunt drives spatial exploration from peaceful areas to dangerous fortress
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Choco (Paradise Star) to endgame space fortress
